title: Messenger Ravens
description: A new mob, the Raven! The raven can be tamed through gold or iron nuggets and bred through sweet berries. The main functionallity of the ravens is that if given an item that is named after a player (by using the anvil!) the raven will deliver it to them!
body:
This mod adds a new mob, the raven!
# **Dependencies**:
Requires Geckolib 4.8.4: [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
# **Spawning**:
The raven spawns in forests and mountains in groups of 1-3. Should be compatible with most biome mods that add forests.

# **Taming**:
 Ravens can be tamed through iron or gold nuggets.
## **Breeding**:
 Bred using sweet berries, this will make a baby raven! ![Baby ravens!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c071d9d2e92026b65be4347d901c02ea4fe0ab68.png)
### **Functionallity**:
 After being tamed they can be sat and given items.![Raven Sitting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94f8b9aee3eb8d07639775a8ea73e2e50ad36769.png)
 If the raven is given an item corresponding to a players name (renamed through the use of an anvil), the raven will fly towards the target and teleport near them. The raven will then fly out the 35~ blocks towards the target and wait for them to take the item from them.

 ![Raven holding lightning rod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/579369e55e8265f8f7b75a7ac960ce01673bc087.png)

 ![Dangerous Raven](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fac69aa7ff9fa47032073acea3209549fad7ca19.webp)
